messages.author: redghost
messages.text: Hello! Any Northern Michiganders on MC? Haven’t seen any in the several weeks I’ve had my node set up
messages.content_html: Hello! Any Northern Michiganders on MC? Haven’t seen any in the several weeks I’ve had my node set up

messages.author: Nerobergstr
messages.text: Hopefully working our way up there. I’m in SE Michigan with a small cluster in Lake Orion, my brother is growing a cluster in central Michigan. Hoping to get a few repeaters near St. Ignace this summer. Michigan is still pretty lonely on MC.
messages.content_html: Hopefully working our way up there. I’m in SE Michigan with a small cluster in Lake Orion, my brother is growing a cluster in central Michigan. Hoping to get a few repeaters near St. Ignace this summer. Michigan is still pretty lonely on MC.

messages.author: Uncle Lit
messages.text: the meshcore dev team have moved to a new discord server. details and reasons are here: https://blog.meshcore.io/2026/04/23/the-split Please create a new thread for your region in the https://discord.com/channels/1495203904898728149/1495412453150818585 for your region on the new meshcore.io discord server. https://meshcore.gg
